questions.question: What is the recommended way to force a component to fully re-initialize in Vue?
options: Call this.$forceUpdate() in the Composition API
Use v-if to toggle the component off and on
Change the component's :key attribute to a new value
Call component.reload() from a parent ref

questions.question: What happens to lifecycle hooks when a component's :key changes?
options: No hooks run — Vue patches the component in place
Only onUpdated runs since the DOM is replaced
All lifecycle hooks run again from onMounted
onBeforeUnmount and onUnmounted fire, but not onMounted

questions.question: Why is $forceUpdate not available in the Composition API?
options: It was deprecated and removed for performance reasons
The assumption is that correct reactive state makes it unnecessary
It conflicts with Vue 3's Proxy-based reactivity system
It was replaced by the watchEffect cleanup mechanism
